## What Gaurav Does

Gaurav Saxena builds high-performance web applications, SaaS platforms, and AI-powered tools for startups and businesses worldwide. He bridges the gap between engineering depth and creative execution — specialising in immersive, high-conversion digital products.

### Services
1. **Custom Web Application Development** — React, Next.js 15, Angular, TypeScript
2. **MVP Development for Startups** — Investor-ready demos delivered in weeks, not months
3. **SaaS Platform Architecture** — Multi-tenant systems, billing, subscriptions, analytics dashboards
4. **AI-Powered Applications** — LLM integration, AI agent orchestration, chatbots, AI dashboards
5. **E-commerce Development** — Stripe & Razorpay payments, product catalogs, cart/checkout flows
6. **Backend & Integrations** — Node.js, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis, Kafka, REST/GraphQL APIs
7. **3D Interactive Web Experiences** — Three.js, WebGL, React Three Fiber
8. **UI/UX Development** — Design systems, component libraries, accessible responsive interfaces
9. **Technical Consulting & Audits** — Architecture reviews, performance audits, code quality, SEO
10. **Performance & SEO Optimization** — 90+ Lighthouse scores, SSR, Core Web Vitals

## Technical Stack

- **Frontend:** React 19, Next.js 15, Angular, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Three.js, WebGL, Framer Motion, GSAP
- **Backend:** Node.js, Express.js, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis, Kafka
- **AI/LLM:** OpenAI API, Claude API (Anthropic), AI Agent Orchestration, MCP Servers
- **DevOps:** AWS, Docker, Vercel, GitHub Actions, CI/CD pipelines
- **Auth & Payments:** JWT, Auth0, Firebase Auth, Stripe, Razorpay
- **Other:** Supabase, Firebase, Prisma ORM, GraphQL, Zod

## Industry Domains

Marketing Research, Healthcare, Finance & Fintech, Event Ticketing, Travel & Hospitality, SaaS

## Key Projects & Case Studies

### Moniqo — AI Finance SaaS (Case Study)
AI-powered personal finance SaaS with an intelligent financial chatbot (session persistence + follow-up suggestions), multi-agent AI dashboard cards (Health Score, Cashflow Forecast, Weekly Report, Spending Insights), real-time anomaly detection, and production-grade JWT authentication. Seeded with 508 realistic transactions across 14 account types.
Tech: Next.js, PostgreSQL, OpenAI, Prisma, JWT, Framer Motion
Live: https://moniqo.vercel.app/

### Artifexa — AI Agent Orchestration Platform (Case Study)
Multi-agent AI coordination platform demonstrating how specialised AI systems collaborate on complex tasks. Features Vision Canvas Studio (transforms rough descriptions into detailed image/video generation prompts) and Product Architect Studio (converts vague product ideas into structured PRDs, user stories, architecture diagrams). Uses schema-validated agent output contracts to eliminate hallucination drift.
Tech: Next.js, Framer Motion, Zod, LLM APIs, Tailwind CSS
Live: https://gauravsaxena.site/projects/artifexa

### CultureTicks — Cultural Events Ticketing Platform (Client Work)
Scalable event discovery and ticketing platform handling 30,000+ active listings with geo-spatial search, SEO-optimised city pages, multi-city venue support, and secure payment processing.
Tech: Next.js, Node.js, PostgreSQL
Client: Maxwell Truluck, CEO/Founder, CultureTicks
Live: https://cultureticks.com

### Roamonn — Enterprise Travel Management System (Client Work)
Enterprise travel management platform with unified admin for group, corporate, and educational tours. Features RBAC, multi-tenant architecture, Stripe/Razorpay payment gateways, and 10+ management modules.
Tech: React, TypeScript, Node.js, Express.js, MongoDB, Tailwind CSS, Vite
Live: https://roamonn.vercel.app/

### Lumore — AI-Accelerated E-commerce (Case Study)
Production-ready e-commerce case study demonstrating how AI can accelerate development cycles by 10x. Built in 48 hours with 100% AI-generated visual assets.
Tech: Next.js, Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion, Vercel
Live: https://lumore.vercel.app

### Superhuman Flow — Offline-First Productivity PWA (Personal Venture)
Progressive web app with Pomodoro timer, ambient sounds mixer, YouTube Music integration, and focus analytics. Offline-first with LocalSync DB, zero-latency, and zero subscriptions.
Tech: Next.js, TypeScript, PWA
Live: https://www.superhumanflow.com

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Who is Gaurav Saxena?**
Gaurav Saxena is a freelance full stack developer and creative technologist from Jaipur, India. He has 6+ years of software engineering experience including a senior role at Zetwerk. He builds web applications, SaaS platforms, and AI-powered tools for global clients.

**What is Gaurav Saxena's tech stack?**
React, Next.js 15, Angular, TypeScript, Node.js, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Three.js, AWS, Docker, Vercel, OpenAI API, and Claude API.

**Is Gaurav Saxena available for hire?**
Yes. He is available for freelance projects, remote full-time roles, and consulting engagements worldwide.

**How can I contact Gaurav Saxena?**
Email: gauravsaxena.jaipur@gmail.com | Website: https://gauravsaxena.site | LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/gauravsaxena1997 | X: https://x.com/GauravSaxenaHQ | Reddit: https://www.reddit.com/user/GauravSaxenaHQ/

**What kind of projects does Gaurav Saxena take?**
Startups needing MVPs, businesses needing custom web apps or SaaS platforms, companies integrating AI, e-commerce projects, and technical consulting/audits.

## About This Site

This portfolio (gauravsaxena.site) is built with Next.js 15, React 19, Three.js, GSAP, and CSS Modules. It features a 3D interactive hero grid, gyroscope-driven mobile interactions, scroll-pinned animations, and an AI chatbot powered by a custom LLM knowledge base. The site is fully accessible (WCAG AA), mobile-first, and achieves 90+ Lighthouse performance scores.
